prTitle: feat: build SpectatorView page with read-only game display
prBody:
## Summary

- Create `SpectatorView.tsx` as a read-only variant of `Game.tsx` that displays full game state (all countries' resources, round info, phase, leaderboard) without any action buttons
- Add spectator count badge and "Spectating" indicator in the game header
- Add `spectator_count` optional field to `GameState` TypeScript type
- Add `spectateGame` API method for future backend integration
- Add `isSpectator` option to `useGameWebSocket` hook for spectator mode connections
- Register `/spectate/:gameId` as a protected route in `App.tsx`
- Add spectator badge CSS styles
- Real-time updates via WebSocket with connection status banner and round summary display

Closes #84
